candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet match for cash and cash equivalents.
Cash flow ending cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow beginning cash, not the balance-sheet cash balance for the year-end target.
Not cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Operating cash flow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash from Investing Activities
candidates.why: Investing cash flow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash from Financing Activities
candidates.why: Financing cash flow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Impact of changes in cash exchange rates
candidates.why: FX effect on cash, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit balance-sheet cash line.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean short-term debt component excluding leases; current interest-bearing liabilities are split into loans and financial lease.
Likely includes lease liabilities because it reconciles to loans from financial institutions, ST plus financial lease, ST; baseline STD should exclude leases.
Current debt-like item but leases must be excluded from baseline STD.
Could indicate maturities schedule, but preview has no values and is less clean than the explicit short-term loans row.

variables.notes: Used the short-term loans row because 'Short-term Interest Bearing Liabilities' appears to include 'Financial Lease, ST', which should be excluded.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet match for taxes payable/current tax liability.
Cash flow adjustment line, not a balance-sheet taxes payable balance.

variables.notes: Chose a balance-sheet current tax liability label outside the shortlist; confident it matches taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet match for property, plant and equipment / total net tangible fixed assets.
Balancing line rather than the reported asset line.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depr Other Tangible Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Investments in Tangible and Intangible Assets
candidates.why: Capex cash flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected the reported tangible assets line as the best proxy for net PPE under IFRS-style presentation.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.
Only a component/other line, not total operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: As Reported Cash from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Chose the explicit operating cash flow total outside the shortlist; confident it is the correct OANCF label.
